explore.noSharedSkills: No one has shared a skill with you yet.
explore.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your search, or upload the first skill.
explore.createFirst: Create your first skill to get started

mySkills.createFirst: Create your first skill to get started
mySkills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

skillDetail.author: Author
skillDetail.auditStartedBody: We're running the audit in the background. It takes around 20–30 seconds — when it's done, a new entry will appear in the Audit history card below. You can close this dialog and keep working.
skillDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
skillDetail.notFoundDesc: The skill you are looking for does not exist.
skillDetail.cliPromptCopied: Install prompt copied — paste it into your agent
skillDetail.cliCopyFailed: Failed to copy install prompt to clipboard
skillDetail.deprecationWarning: This version is marked deprecated by the author. Pin to a newer version if possible.
skillDetail.deprecationNotePlaceholder: Reason, migration path, or replacement version…
skillDetail.auditBannerNotAudited: v{{v}} has not been audited yet. Owners share with permission gates that read this audit.
skillDetail.auditBannerYellow: Audit verdict for v{{v}} is YELLOW ({{score}}/10). Some findings flagged.
skillDetail.auditBannerRed: Audit verdict for v{{v}} is RED ({{score}}/10). Use with caution.
skillDetail.deleteVersionBlockedOnly: Can't delete the only remaining version. Use 'Delete skill' in the danger zone instead.
skillDetail.deleteVersionBlockedLatest: Can't delete the current latest version. Publish a newer version first, then delete this one.
skillDetail.deleteVersionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete v{{version}}? The version's package zip and audit history are removed and this cannot be undone.
skillDetail.auditNoneYet: Not audited yet for this version.
skillDetail.dangerExplain: Permanently delete this skill and every version. This cannot be undone.

editSkill.privateDesc: Only you can see this skill. Make it public to share with others.
editSkill.publicDesc: This skill is visible to everyone. Make it private to hide it.
editSkill.updatePackageDesc: Upload a new ZIP package to replace the current skill contents. Tags, description, and metadata are extracted from the SKILL.md inside the ZIP.

audit.noFindings: No findings — the auditor had nothing to flag.

analytics.heading: Usage analytics
analytics.unavailable: Usage analytics are not available yet.
analytics.usageSubtitle: Pulls over time. api = SDK / CLI / agent · web = detail-page download · playground = in-product trial.

versionDiff.title: Compare versions
versionDiff.needTwoVersions: This skill only has one version — there's nothing to compare yet.
versionDiff.sameVersion: Pick two different versions to see a diff.
versionDiff.noChanges: These two versions have identical files.
versionDiff.truncated: File content truncated at 64 KiB per side.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.publicDesc: Anyone on Ornn can find and use this skill, including unauthenticated visitors.
permissions.orgsDesc: Every admin and member of a checked org can see and use this skill.
permissions.usersDesc: Search by email. Only users who have signed into Ornn appear here.
permissions.privateDesc: Only you and platform admins can see this skill. Active when nothing above is set.
permissions.searchPlaceholder: type an email to find a user...

platformSettings.title: Platform settings
platformSettings.subtitle: Platform-wide knobs that affect every owner and reviewer. Changes take effect on the next audit run.
platformSettings.auditThresholdHint: Audit overall score at or above this cutoff auto-grants a new share. Below it, the grant becomes a waiver request that the owner must justify and a reviewer must approve.
platformSettings.auditThresholdInvalid: Must be a number between 0 and 10.

playground.selectSkill: Select a skill to try in the playground.
playground.fillEnvVars: Fill in the required environment variables on the right to start chatting.
playground.askAbout: Ask me anything about "{{name}}" or tell me to run it.
playground.envVarsDesc: This skill requires the following environment variables. Fill them in before chatting.
playground.fillFirst: Fill in env vars to start chatting...
playground.askPlaceholder: Ask about "{{name}}" or tell me to run it...

upload.chooseMode: Choose how you want to create your skill
upload.guidedDesc: Step-by-step wizard that guides you through creating a skill. Perfect for beginners or structured authoring.
upload.freeDesc: Upload a pre-built skill package as a ZIP file. Best for experienced authors with existing skills.
upload.genDesc: Describe what you need and let AI generate a complete skill for you. Refine with chat.
upload.githubDesc: Pull a skill from a public GitHub repo. Later updates can be re-synced with one click.

guided.headerDesc: Follow the steps below to create a new skill
guided.descPlaceholder: A brief description of what this skill does (min 10 chars)
guided.runtimeDepsHelper: npm packages required by runtime scripts (e.g., axios, lodash)
guided.disableModelInvocationDesc: Prevent the AI from invoking this skill as a sub-model call
guided.userInvocableDesc: Allow users to directly invoke this skill
guided.allowedToolsHelper: Tools this skill is allowed to use (Claude spec)
guided.contextPathsHelper: File paths to include as context for the skill
guided.argumentHintPlaceholder: Provide a file path or URL
guided.contentDesc: Write the body content for your SKILL.md. This will appear below the auto-generated YAML frontmatter.
guided.contentPlaceholder:
# My Skill

Describe what this skill does, how to use it, and provide examples...
guided.filesDesc: Upload script files, reference docs, or assets to specific folders. SKILL.md is auto-generated from your metadata and content.
guided.dropHint: Drop file here or click to browse

generative.title: GENERATE SKILL
generative.desc: Describe the skill you need and AI will generate it for you. You can refine it with follow-up messages.
generative.note: Generated skills are plain or runtime-based only.
generative.emptyPreview: Generate a skill to preview its contents
generative.fixErrors: Fix frontmatter validation errors before saving

free.title: UPLOAD SKILL PACKAGE
free.subtitle: Upload a pre-built skill as a .zip file
free.dropzone: Drag & drop a .zip file or click to browse
free.validWithErrors: Package structure is valid, but frontmatter has validation errors. Fix them before uploading.
free.tooLarge: File exceeds the maximum size of 50 MB ({{size}}).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account
settings.accountDesc: Your profile, LLM credentials, and security settings are managed through NyxID.

login.desc: Sign in with your NyxID account to access the platform.
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

notFound.message: This sector of the grid does not exist.

docs.copyMarkdownHint: Copy this whole document as markdown — paste it into your AI agent to install as a skill

skillToggle.makePrivateDesc: Are you sure you want to make this skill private? Other users will no longer be able to view it.
skillToggle.makePublicDesc: Are you sure you want to make this skill public? All users will be able to view it.
skillToggle.nowPrivate: Skill is now private. Only you can view it.
skillToggle.nowPublic: Skill is now public. All users can view it.

chatInput.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)

landing.bannerSkills: Core Skills for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor & Antigravity
landing.heroDesc: The skill-lifecycle API your AI agent calls. Search, pull, run, build, and share skills through one HTTP / MCP surface — npm for agents, model-agnostic by design.
landing.showcaseDesc: Browse the most-used capabilities in the registry.
landing.frameworkDesc: Ornn isn't just a list; it's a protocol. A standardized way for AI agents to discover, verify, and execute capabilities across any environment.
landing.feature1Desc: Every skill runs in an isolated, auditable sandbox.
landing.feature3Desc: One line to discover. One line to execute.

githubLink.intro: Point this skill at a folder in a public GitHub repo. Saving the link does not pull anything; click Sync afterwards to preview changes and publish a new version.
githubLink.urlHelp: Use the folder URL (the /tree/<ref>/<path> form). The skill's SKILL.md must be at the root of that folder. Default-branch and repo-root URLs work too.
githubLink.skipValidationHelp: GitHub-hosted skills don't always follow Ornn's package rules; tick this if you trust the upstream and want syncs to succeed even when the validator would reject the layout.
githubLink.saveBeforeSync: Save the URL change first, then sync.
githubLink.alreadyInSync: Already in sync — no changes to pull from GitHub.
githubLink.syncSuccess: Synced from GitHub — new version published.
githubLink.previewSubtitle: Apply this sync to publish v{{version}} of {{name}} from the linked GitHub source.

githubImport.title: Import from GitHub
githubImport.subtitle: Publish a skill from a folder in a public GitHub repo. Subsequent updates can be re-synced from the same link in one click.
githubImport.urlHint: Use the folder URL (the /tree/<ref>/<path> form). The skill's SKILL.md must sit at the root of that folder. Default-branch and repo-root URLs work too.
githubImport.skipValidationHelp: GitHub-hosted skills don't always follow Ornn's package rules; tick this if you trust the upstream and want the import to succeed even when the validator would reject the layout.
